notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero singles on a line drive to left fielder Junior Perez. José Caballero to 2nd. José Caballero advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Tristan Peters.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters plunked
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters hit by pitch. Sam Antonacci to 3rd. Jacob Gonzalez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi hits a grand slam (9) to right center field. Sam Antonacci scores. Jacob Gonzalez scores. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi hits a grand slam (9) to right center field. Sam Antonacci scores. Jacob Gonzalez scores. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci grounds out sharply, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Sean Burke picks off José Caballero at 2nd on throw to shortstop Luisangel Acuña.

notableEvents.label: Anthony Volpe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Anthony Volpe doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Junior Perez. Anthony Volpe out at 3rd on the throw, left fielder Junior Perez to third baseman Colson Montgomery.
